frame_convention: T_w_r maps robot-base coordinates into the ChArUco/world frame. Use T_r_g = inv(T_w_r) @ T_w_g to convert generated world-frame grasp poses into robot-base poses.
measurement_note: From the annotated desk layout: world origin is about 0.77 m in front of the robot base and about 0.08 m to the robot's left. Re-measure and update this file if the board or robot moves.
